title: Ender Saga ESM
description: Experience Zelda-like gameplay with Fabric. Face numerous bosses to open the portal to The End and defeat the Ender Dragon.
body:
![Ender Saga](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/umLu/poltermods/main/Ender_Saga_title.png)

Experience Zelda-like gameplay with Fabric. Face numerous bosses to open the portal to The End and defeat the Ender Dragon.

- Focus on gameplay changes that makes the game experience more interesting for exploration and battle
- Meticulous selection of quality mods
- Balanced mod settings
- Objective-oriented (kill The Ender Dragon)

## Setup

Due to restrictions, some mods need to be manually installed to ensure a better experience:

### Mods

- [Awesome Dungeon - Fabric](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/awesome-dungeon-fabric)
- [Awesome Dungeon Ocean edition - Fabric](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/awesome-dungeon-edition-ocean-fabric)
- [Library Ferret - Fabric](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/library-ferret-fabric) 
- [The Twilight Forest](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-twilight-forest)
- [Mythic Mounts](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mythic-mounts)
- [Probably Chests](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/probably-chests)
- [Server Performance - Smooth Chunk Save[Forge/Fabric]](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/smooth-chunk-save)
- [Farsight [Fabric]](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/farsight-fabric)
- [Xtra Arrows](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/xtra-arrows)
- [Medieval Music[Forge/Fabric]](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/medieval-music)
- [Biome Music[Forge/Fabric]](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/biome-music)
- [Clickable advancements[Forge/Fabric]](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/clickable-advancements)
- [Loot Integrations[Forge/Fabric]](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/loot-integrations)

If installed, all the mods listed above will already be balanced and configured.

### Datapacks and textures

- [Farmer's Delight Wood Stripping Expanded](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/farmers-delight-wood-stripping-expanded)
- [Enchanted Tools](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/enchanted-tools)
- [Enchanted Weapons](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/enchanted-weapons)

Once installed, to use datapacks and textures across all your saves, place them into the 'paxi' folder, located inside the 'config' folder.

### Missing mods

Although the following mods are dependencies of the modpack sometimes they are not downloaded for some reason. Download them manually if needed.

- [Alternate Current](https://modrinth.com/mod/r0v8vy1s)
- [No Shield Delay](https://modrinth.com/mod/pOf4Y6Oo)

## Gameplay tips

You start with a shield, bow, arrows, bread, logs, [hookshot](https://modrinth.com/mod/hookshot), [paraglider](https://modrinth.com/mod/XiC6HzoU)  and a [dreamer essence](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/sleep-tight):

```
'offhand' : '{Count:1b,id:"minecraft:shield",tag:{Damage:100}}',
'head' : '',
'chest' : '',
'legs' : '',
'feet' : '{Count:1b,id:"minecraft:leather_boots",tag:{Damage:0}}',
0 : '{Count:1b,id:"minecraft:wooden_sword",tag:{Damage:0}}',
1 : '{Count:4b,id:"minecraft:bread"}',
2 : '{Count:3b,id:"minecraft:oak_log"}',
3 : '{Count:1b,id:"minecraft:bow",tag:{Damage:0}}',
4 : '{Count:20b,id:"minecraft:arrow"}',
5 : '{Count:1b,id:"vc_gliders:paraglider_wood",tag:{Damage:0}}',
6 : '{Count:1b,id:"hookshot:gray_hookshot",tag:{Damage:0}}',
7 : '{Count:1b,id:"sleep_tight:dreamer_essence"}',
```

- Use your [hookshot](https://modrinth.com/mod/hookshot), [paraglider](https://modrinth.com/mod/XiC6HzoU)  (equip in the cape slot), and bow from the beginning (loot will help replenish)
- Use the dreamer essence (part of [sleep tight](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/sleep-tight)) at your home base (to set home base, sleep 7 times in the same bed and it will start to heal you overnight)
- Search for Waystones in villages or towers (in chests)
- Make [Bottle o' Dimensional Tears](https://github.com/AstralOrdana/Spelunkery/wiki/Dimensional-Tears-Fluid#bottle-o-dimensional-tears) to quickly escape from deep caves
- Play with a friend with different combat styles ([wizard](https://modrinth.com/mod/wizards) + [paladin](https://modrinth.com/mod/paladins-and-priests), or [ranger](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/xtra-arrows)    + warrior, etc.)
- [Find bosses and collect the eyes](https://modrinth.com/datapack/explorers-blend) to be able to open The End portal and kill the Ender Dragon
